data.text:
Committed. All three AC items addressed in `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/components/CommandPalette.svelte`:

1. Search input (line 505): `border border-border-line ... focus:border-accent-lever` → `border-0 bg-transparent ... focus:ring-1 focus:ring-accent-lever` — removes the double-border with the header's `border-b`.
2. kbd (line 509): added `bg-bg-surface dark:bg-dark-bg-surface`.
3. Command.Item (line 540): `data-[selected]:bg-bg-surface` → `data-[selected]:bg-bg-canvas` (and dark variant), so hover and selected share one canvas highlight tone — matching `NavShell.svelte` (lines 126–127). Pattern documented inline at line 532.
